{{CargoOrgan
|name=Ooka-Whoa
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10723
|idx=80
|description=Whose beak is pointy-pointy?
Rooster's beak is pointy-pointy!
Whose bill is flatty-flat?
Ducky's bill is flatty-flat!
Whose lips are roundy-round?
Fishy's lips are roundy-round!
Whose mouth is widey-wide?
Toad's mouth is widey-wide!
Ooka-WHOAAAA!
|skill=Before round start, there is a 48% chance to lick the enemy, stunning them for 1 turn and reducing their DEF by 13.4% this turn!
|hp=3070
|def=321
|atk=242
|rush=200
|gene1={race} Water CRIT DMG +4%
|gene2={race} Leadership +5
|gene3={race} Water CRIT Rate +2%
|gene4=DMG +5%
|gene5=Paralyze enemy by +4%
|gene6={race} Leadership +10
|gene7=All Minion RUSH +1.6% (Awakened)
|}}
